content:
## Cobalt Blue Referral Offer
Cobalt Blue Account participates in the Northstar Bank referral program as a business_checking offer. When the referral qualifies, the referrer receives 150 and the referred customer receives 75. Use this page for Cobalt Blue Account referrals only; see "Business Checking Referral Programs" for other business checking offers.

## Eligibility Requirements
1. The referrer must have at least 60 days of tenure before the referral is eligible.
2. The referred customer must open a Cobalt Blue Account.
3. The referred customer must make a minimum referred deposit of 10000.
4. Do not apply this offer to Blue Account or Green Fee Free Account referrals, even when the customer asks about a similarly named account.

## Annual Limit
A referrer may receive no more than 12 Cobalt Blue Account referral bonuses in a year. Once that cap is reached, do not quote an additional referrer bonus for another Cobalt Blue Account referral. The referred customer bonus remains the listed 75 only when the referred side satisfies the deposit requirement. See "Referral Limits And Eligibility" for shared referral limit handling.
title: Cobalt Blue Account Referral Terms
